title: Deep Dive into Flashbacks: How They Unfold and Planning Your Own

questions.question: What does "harvest moon" mean?
options: The black centre of the eye that lets light in.
A large, bright moon that appears close to the horizon around the time of the autumn harvest.
The coloured part of the eye around the pupil.
questions.correct_answer: A large, bright moon that appears close to the horizon around the time of the autumn harvest.
questions.explanation: "harvest moon" means: A large, bright moon that appears close to the horizon around the time of the autumn harvest.

questions.question: What does "pupil" mean?
options: A large, bright moon that appears close to the horizon around the time of the autumn harvest.
The black centre of the eye that lets light in.
The coloured part of the eye around the pupil.
questions.correct_answer: The black centre of the eye that lets light in.
questions.explanation: "pupil" means: The black centre of the eye that lets light in.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Flashbacks can be triggered by unusual ______ or sensory details in the main story.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Flashbacks can be triggered by unusual events or sensory details in the main story."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Writers use vivid descriptions to show how a flashback progresses and what is seen.
Planning a flashback sequence involves thinking about what's normal, the trigger, and the past details.
Stories can belong to one or more genres (e.g., fantasy, mystery, adventure).
Flashbacks can be triggered by unusual events or sensory details in the main story.
questions.correct_answer: Writers use vivid descriptions to show how a flashback progresses and what is seen.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Writers use vivid descriptions to show how a flashback progresses and what is seen." is one of the key things to remember.

questions.question: What does "fleck" mean?
options: The black centre of the eye that lets light in.
The coloured part of the eye around the pupil.
A large, bright moon that appears close to the horizon around the time of the autumn harvest.
questions.explanation: "fleck" means: A small mark or spot.
